context.role: Aerial obstacle that can be avoided without input, appears after 200 points
context.screen_position: Scrolls from right (650px) to left (-100px), Y=80px (ground + 80px)
context.usage_scenario: Flies above player running hitbox (90px height), can be avoided by ducking or simply running through without input

visual_specification.shape: Pteranodon with long beak, outstretched wings in flight

animation.description: Frame 1: wings up position, Frame 2: wings down position - flapping animation

visual_specification.details: Flying pterodactyl with visible long beak, wings clearly showing up/down flapping motion

relationships.shared_with: Same sprite and animation as pterodactyl_low, only Y position differs
relationships.differences_from: pterodactyl_low flies at Y=50px, this flies at Y=80px - higher position allows passing without ducking

explicit_negations: No smooth curves - only pixel-aligned edges
No colors outside the defined palette
No variation in flight path - straight horizontal movement only
Not visually different from pterodactyl_low - same sprite, different Y position
Does not require player action to avoid (height above player hitbox)
